headline: DoorDash Tests Stablecoin Payouts To Reshape Gig Worker Economics
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) has rolled out a stablecoin-powered payout system for Dashers and merchants. The new infrastructure uses the Tempo blockchain payments network to support cross-border disbursements. The service is available in over 40 countries, targeting faster and lower-cost international payouts. DoorDash, best known for its food delivery and local commerce platform, is extending its role in payments infrastructure with this stablecoin rollout. For a company that already manages...

headline: Alphabet Stock Gains 2.1% After Unveiling New AI Inference Chip
summary: GOOGL shares rise 2.1% after unveiling TPU 8i AI chip, highlighting faster performance, lower costs and a deeper push into scalable in-house AI infrastructure.

headline: Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms
summary: President Donald Trump has been posting a lot on social media about his White House ballroom, the Iran war, and Pope Leo XIV. Not much about rising gas prices.
